title: About Paris
content: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France. It is known for fashion, art, and the Eiffel Tower.

title: Weather in France
content: The weather in France varies greatly. Paris usually has mild weather, especially in spring and autumn.

title: London Information
content: London, the capital of England and the United Kingdom, is a 21st-century city with history stretching back to Roman times.

title: Skiing in France
content: France offers excellent skiing opportunities in the Alps. Spring skiing can be very enjoyable.

title: Another Paris Document
content: Exploring Paris offers a rich cultural experience. The city of Paris is vibrant.
